name: Banro Corporation
description: Banro Corporation is a Canadian gold mining company focused on the exploration, development, and production of gold properties in the Democratic Republic of the Congo. The company's principal assets include the Twangiza and Namoya gold mines, located along the Twangiza-Namoya gold belt in the South Kivu and Maniema provinces. Banro is committed to unlocking the significant gold potential of this region while adhering to high standards of social responsibility and environmental stewardship.
